paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 46 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 20 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 39 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Katie Holmes & Sean Springs, CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 18. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $22,277 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,457 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,890 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $31,620 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $34,504 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,130 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 upcoming tasks still unassigned.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 10 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 6 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

242 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **91 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 27 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$76,020 in payments going out this week** across 31 tasks — make sure funds are available. $69,484 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 6. This needs to turn around today.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 5 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 6 tasks in progress. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 45 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff has 7 overdue across 4 projects with 2 tasks active.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 8 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 48 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 4 overdue — oldest first. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. 2 upcoming unassigned.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 10. This needs to turn around today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 18 overdue — oldest first. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 5 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
